value_chain_position: Broadband platform software and systems layer — sells cloud-and-software platform (Calix Cloud) plus access hardware to community broadband providers (telcos, rural ISPs, co-ops), enabling subscriber intelligence and revenue operations.
relative_comps: Calix is repositioning from a hardware vendor to a platform-software company serving community broadband operators; 28% YoY growth reflects that mix shift and the rural broadband BEAD tailwind. It competes with Adtran on the hardware side and lacks a direct platform comp, giving it pricing power in a fragmented addressable market. FCF margin at 10% is thin vs. pure-software peers, and the 3Y CAGR of 5% reflects the transitional period; the high YoY acceleration is the key signal.
